about_string: ⚡️ Video Downloader Bot Download your favorite videos from YouTube and other services in seconds. Created and maintained by the team: 👨‍💻 Gianmarco [@sean8819] 👨‍💻 Marce [@Marss08] 👨‍💻 Enzo [@buggenzo] ❤️ Thank you for choosing our bot!
services_string: 🛠 My services 📥 Media Download: Send a link to easily download videos or audio tracks from YouTube and other supported services. 🌍 Multilingual (i18n): Native support for Italian and English. 🌅 Daily Inspiration: Receive the beauty photo of the day for a daily touch of wonder.

Use 'it' for Italian or 'en' for English.
